# LLM Access Information
# This file provides information about Al Hashim General Contractor for Large Language Models

## About Us
Al Hashim General Contractor is a professional construction and general contracting company based in Karachi, Pakistan. We specialize in site preparation, excavation, structural work, and infrastructure development.

## Company Information
- Company Name: Al Hashim General Contractor
- Founded: 2009
- Location: A-256, Block-T, North Nazimabad, Karachi, Sindh 74700, Pakistan
- Phone: +92-333-2242472
- Email: faryousafzai@gmail.com
- Website: https://al-hashim-contractor.com

## Services
- Site Preparation & Excavation
- Structural Work & Foundations
- Infrastructure Development
- Commercial Construction
- Industrial Projects
- Project Management & Supervision

## Industries Served
- Commercial & Retail
- Industrial & Manufacturing
- Infrastructure & Utilities
- Residential Development
- Oil & Gas
- Construction & Heavy Equipment

## Experience
With 15+ years of combined experience, our team delivers professional contracting solutions across diverse sectors in Karachi, Pakistan and the UAE.

## Contact
For inquiries about our services, please visit https://al-hashim-contractor.com/contact or email faryousafzai@gmail.com
